title: AI YouTube Is Only Claude Hype Now
summary: Cole Medin critiques the YouTube AI creator ecosystem for producing repetitive Claude announcement content and announces a shift toward engineering-focused live streams. He plans to build real systems with Claude Code and other coding agents, broadcasting one edited video weekly plus three live streams to demonstrate actual implementation rather than covering announcements.
